consent_banner_body: We use cookies and similar technologies to power the site, understand usage, and — with your permission — personalize content. You can accept everything, reject non-essential categories, or choose exactly what to allow.
consent_preferences_description: Choose exactly which categories we're allowed to use. Your choice is saved locally and applies to every page on this site.
dsar_form_description: Under GDPR, CCPA, and similar laws, you have the right to access, correct, port, or delete the personal data we hold about you. Submit a request and we'll respond within the legal deadline (30 days under GDPR; 45 under CCPA).
dsar_form_submitted: Request received. We'll email you once it's processed.
unsubscribe_body: Confirm that you want to stop receiving {listName} emails.
unsubscribe_confirmed: You've been unsubscribed. It may take up to 24 hours for the change to propagate.
